Description: Wasp Wing tier line. Base WCID 7603 (vanilla 'White Phyntos Wasp Wing') renamed to plain 'Wasp Wing'; color variants (3699-3703, 8426, 13089) merged via sibling replacement. Three new tier WCIDs (850283-850285) clone from 7603. Per-tier UiEffects glow (white/green/blue/purple) AND sunstone orange IconUnderlay (DID 52 = 100676438) on all tiers, matching Drudge Charms. Higher tiers route through any NPC's WCID 7603 Give emote.

Weenies.Notes: Regular tier (vanilla 'White Phyntos Wasp Wing' renamed). Sibling colored variants get replaced with this WCID at corpse-drop time.

PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these wings.
